ValidationRule.description: Contact Cost Center must match Account Cost Center
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, NOT( AccountId = "001b000000Pq6Jn"), RecordType.DeveloperName ="InternalContact", CostCenter__r.LegalAccount__r.Id <> Account.Id )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The Internal Account & the selected Cost Center do not match. (CO001)
